scripts.build: node -e "console.log('@strota/api-python build runs in the dedicated Python CI job (apps/api-python pyproject.toml); skipped from Turbo Node pipeline')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@strota/api-python lint runs in dedicated Python CI job via ruff')"
scripts.typecheck: node -e "console.log('@strota/api-python typecheck runs in dedicated Python CI job via mypy')"
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@strota/api-python tests run in dedicated Python CI job via pytest')"
scripts.py:lint: uv run ruff check src tests
scripts.py:lint:fix: uv run ruff check --fix src tests && uv run ruff format src tests
